case_title: CARLENA WONG VS. LETICIA VIRGINIA FIGUEROA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, CARLENA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FIGUEROA, LETICIA VIRGINIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1311 12TH AVENUE, APT 2, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94122 $23,718.56 RENT, $1,200.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $25,218.56, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC
